title: Nycterium heterodoxum
intro: Nycterium heterodoxum, commonly known as the night-blooming clematis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Bioactive constituents of Nycterium heterodoxum include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, extracts, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
